quote: Broome drove a spear into his huge pale belly
Ser Marston surprised Grand Maester Gerardys in his rookery

name: Poisoning of Ulf White
quote: his wine cup was deadlier than Valyrian steel

name: Fall of Dragonstone
quote: the fall of Dragonstone took less than an hour

name: Death of Queen Rhaenyra
quote: the golden dragon devoured the queen in six bites

text: He advised the king's men on the castle's weaknesses and drove a spear through Ser Robert Quince.
He was killed in his bed by Ser Alfred Broome's spear thrust, which pinned him to the floor.
He surprised Grand Maester Gerardys in the rookery so no raven could escape.
He slew Moondancer in the yard and devoured both her carcass and Queen Rhaenyra.
